name: mojo-ci-wildcard-pattern-coverage
description: Determine whether CI workflow test patterns need updating after splitting or adding Mojo test files. Use when: (1) adding new test_*.mojo files and unsure if CI workflow needs updating, (2) splitting a test file into parts and checking if the Data/Core CI groups auto-discover the new files, (3) validate_test_coverage.py reports coverage issues after a split.
